implementationModel.normalization: Actor-owned feat items are normalized with abilityMeta.rules entries on create/update item hooks.
implementationModel.runtimeBridge: The older SkillFeatResolver remains the chat/runtime skill resolver. skill-feat-runtime-patches.js bridges normalized SkillFeatRuleResolver reroll and substitution output into the older resolver so existing skill reroll chat behavior remains intact.
implementationModel.extraSkillUses: The ExtraSkillUseRegistry now includes baseline procedure/task IDs for Gather Information, Jury-Rig, Surgery, and Install Cybernetic Device.

Conditioning: Adds trained Strength/Constitution skill reroll metadata for Climb, Jump, Swim, Endurance, and Athletics.
Skill reroll buttons are surfaced through the existing skill chat reroll path and must keep the second result.
Informer: Adds a Gather Information skill-use substitution allowing Perception for the Gather Information extra use.
The runtime bridge falls back to new SkillFeatRuleResolver substitutions when the older resolver has no match.
Rapport: Adds Aid Another rider metadata consumed by the existing AidAnotherActionAdapter rider collector and displayed on guided Aid Another cards.
Recall: Adds trained Knowledge reroll metadata, keep better result, once per day.
The runtime bridge adds day-scope tracking using actor flag foundryvtt-swse.skillFeatDailyUses.

metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Cybernetic Surgery: Grants a Treat Injury cybernetic installation extra use/procedure reference with DC, time, retry, and self-install constraints. It does not auto-install cybernetics.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Surgical Expertise: Adds a procedure time override for Surgery and Cybernetic Surgery procedures, reducing the time reference from 1 hour to 10 minutes.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Gearhead: Adds once-per-encounter action-economy override metadata for Mechanics and Use Computer checks. A dedicated timed-task/action consumer can use it, but generic skill rolls do not spend the use yet.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Increased Agility: Adds advisory movement/defense metadata for climb speed, swim speed, jump distance, and retaining Dexterity bonus while climbing. Movement and climbing defense context remain workflow/GM adjudicated.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Quick Skill: Adds take-10/take-20 timing metadata. Existing generic skill roll dialog does not yet enforce the once-per-encounter Quick Skill choice.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Advantageous Cover: Adds area-attack cover damage-negation metadata and a cover-state advisory note. Damage application still needs a cover-aware area attack consumer to fully automate it.
metadataOrAdvisoryBacked.Conditioning Fortitude Reaction: Adds advisory reaction metadata for adding Strength modifier to Fortitude once per encounter. Exact reaction timing remains outside the skill roll path.

guardrails: Cybernetic Surgery remains a manual procedure reference, not a passive actor modifier.
No duplicate skill reroll chat system was created; existing SkillFeatResolver chat behavior remains the runtime boundary.
No movement, cover, or cybernetic install automation was invented without a reliable workflow authority.
